ideation: This animation sequence depicts a family (two adults and a child) embracing.  The adults' arms will be positioned to envelop the child, while the child's arms will be raised in a gesture of affection.  The animation will focus on the natural movements of embracing, starting with arms outstretched, then gradually closing in, and finally settling into a warm embrace.  I will use the robot's two-joint arm structure to create a realistic and expressive embrace.

frames.beat: adults' arms open wide, ready to hug
arms begin to close around the child
the embrace tightens, a gentle squeeze
the family is held close in a warm hug
